# Giorgio Rivolta

> Professional website of Giorgio Rivolta, PMP-certified Project Manager specialising in IT, Cloud, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence and digital transformation.

## Professional profile

Giorgio Rivolta is a Project Manager based in Italy with over 15 years of experience.

He manages complex international projects, stakeholders, budgets, risks and cross-functional teams of up to 50+ people.

## Core expertise

- Project Management
- PMP and PMI frameworks
- Scrum
- Stakeholder Management
- People Management
- Microsoft Azure
- Google Cloud
- AWS
- VMware
- SAP
- Data Analytics
- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning
- Digital Transformation

## Industries

- Banking
- Eyewear
- Energy
- Pharmaceuticals
- Transport
- Telecommunications

## Selected projects

- EnterCloudSuite
- On-prem to Azure Cloud Migration
- Procurement Data Hub

## Certifications

- Project Management Professional, PMP
- Professional Scrum Master I, PSM I
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
